text.title: Product Lifecycle Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: single product or pre-PMF; use product-analytics or pivot framework

branch.question: Tag <=90 days old AND no trigger event?

conclusion.verdict: honour existing tag until trigger or next quarter
run full lifecycle classification + strategy match
